description_long: This sculpture consists of a bronze bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular white stone pedestal. The bust depicts a male figure with short hair and formal attire, rendered in a realistic style. The pedestal is made of a light-colored stone or concrete and features a plaque on the front, which contains an inscription with the name and dates of the individual commemorated. The base of the pedestal is square and rests on a slightly larger stone platform, with some moss or weathering visible around the edges. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative monument, likely honoring a notable person. The sculpture is designed for outdoor display, as indicated by the weathering and moss at the base.
description: A bronze bust of a man on a tall white stone pedestal with a commemorative plaque, set on a weathered stone base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the bust and the tall, rectangular pedestal.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the bust and the unadorned back of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile of the bust and pedestal, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Frontal view highlighting the face of the bust and the plaque with inscription on the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors, likely in a public or park setting, as indicated by the weathered base and presence of moss.
